name: msusol
description: Mark Susol's personal Claude Code plugins — planning rules, a Kaggle competition harness, git/db guards, and a usage status line.

plugins.name: clinerules
plugins.description: Deploys planning-* rules to ~/.cline/rules/ and @-imports them in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: kaggle
plugins.description: Light harness for Kaggle competitions — kaggle-* rules, a project-scaffold skill, and /kaggle:new + /kaggle:preflight commands.

plugins.name: db-guard
plugins.description: Two-layer guard against unauthorized DROP TABLE, TRUNCATE, DROP DATABASE, DROP SCHEMA, and DROP COLUMN.

plugins.name: git-guard
plugins.description: Three-layer protection against unauthorized git commit and git push.

plugins.name: usage-statusline
plugins.description: Status line showing model, context %, and subscription rate limits.
